settings_categories_delete_invalid: Please delete all items before attempting to delete the category
settings_categories_delete_items: Select items to delete. Doing so will also delete the purchase history of those items.
settings_categories_empty: This category has no items yet
settings_users_username_invalid: Invalid name. Must have a length of {min} to {max} and contain no special characters.
shopping_add_items_explanation:
Write one type of item per line.
You may optionally add an amount before the item.
For example:
3x Tomatoes
Chocolate
2x Milk
shopping_add_items_parse_error: Some lines could not be parsed. Please check for mistakes.
